content.speakerText: Great! We'll see you at 7:30. Just show up and ask for the host.
content.speakerTextCn: 太好了！七点半见，到时找领位员就行。
expectedAnswers: Cool, appreciate it! Looking forward to it!
Got it, thank you so much. See you at 7:30!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了确认见面时间并礼貌道别
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用了场景高频表达如 'See you then' 或 'appreciate it'

content.speakerText: Your reservation is confirmed. We'll be ready for you at 6:45.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的预订已确认，我们将在6:45为您准备。
expectedAnswers: Awesome, I really appreciate it. Can't wait!
Thanks for confirming! I'll be there on time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感谢并确认将按时到达
语言准确性：动词和介词使用正确，如 'appreciate it', 'see you then'
表达自然度：语气友好，符合英语口语习惯，避免机械重复
